[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000010100 2
1 100110000 3
2 000001000 1
3 000000100 1
4 000000000 a

6 101001011 5
7 001000100 2
